summary: Phase 9 testing complete. All features verified: 1) SaaS Admin 9948303060 login returns super_admin role with null tenant_id, 2) Tenant Admin 8888888888 login returns tenant_admin role with tenant_id, 3) OTP send/verify flow working for both users, 4) Business Rules page loads with 8 default rules, toggle switches, add form, 5) Content Library page loads with stats, 8 type filters, CRUD form, 6) Dashboard More tab shows Business Rules and Content Library links.
seed_data_creation: Business rules auto-seed 8 defaults on first access per tenant. SaaS admin 9948303060 created via setup_saas_admin.py script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 testing complete. All features verified: 1) SaaS Admin (9948303060) is super_admin with no tenant_id - use for SaaS-level operations. 2) Tenant Admin (8888888888) is tenant_admin with tenant_id - use for tenant-specific operations. 3) OTP flow: POST /api/auth/send-otp returns OTP in response (for testing), then POST /api/auth/verify-otp with phone+otp. 4) Business Rules: GET /api/memoraai/rules returns 8 default rules, POST to create, POST /{id}/toggle to toggle, GET /active returns rules_text for AI prompt injection. 5) Content Library: GET /api/memoraai/content, POST to create, GET /stats for stats. 6) Frontend routes: /business-rules, /content-library. 7) Dashboard More tab has all navigation links including Business Rules and Content Library.

auth_login.tenant_admin_8888888888: PASS - Returns tenant_admin role, tenant_id present

otp_flow.send_otp_saas_admin: PASS - OTP sent, returns otp in response
otp_flow.verify_otp_saas_admin: PASS - Returns token with super_admin role

business_rules_api.GET /api/memoraai/rules/active: PASS - Returns active rules with rules_text

business_rules_page.add_rule_form: PASS - Title, Category, Rule text, Save/Cancel

content_library_page.stats_section: PASS - Shows total items and by-type counts
content_library_page.type_filters: PASS - 8 filters (All, Brochure, Image, Video, Link, FAQ, Price List, Document, Template)
content_library_page.add_content_form: PASS - Title, Type, URL, Description, Tags, Save/Cancel
content_library_page.content_items: PASS - Shows existing content with share/edit/delete

dashboard_more_tab.business_rules_link: PASS - 'Business Rules' with subtitle 'Control AI behavior'
dashboard_more_tab.content_library_link: PASS - 'Content Library' with subtitle 'Brochures, images, videos'
